name: James
oracleText:
Haste
Whenever James attacks, he deals 1 damage to any target.
Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, untap James.
flavorText: "He surnamed them Boanerges, which is, The sons of thunder." — Mark 3:17
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics, mana, colors, and stats added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "The Calling of Saint James and Saint John" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: Son of Thunder

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.creditText: James Tissot, The Calling of Saint James and Saint John
classics.sourceNotes: A calling scene gives James an exact place in the Gospel cohort.
